name: chrome-devtools
description: Chrome DevTools MCP — 網頁除錯、效能分析、DOM 操作、Lighthouse

cachedTools.name: click
cachedTools.description: Clicks on the provided element

cachedTools.name: close_page
cachedTools.description: Closes the page by its index. The last open page cannot be closed.

cachedTools.name: drag
cachedTools.description: Drag an element onto another element

cachedTools.name: emulate
cachedTools.description: Emulates various features on the selected page.

cachedTools.name: evaluate_script
cachedTools.description:
Evaluate a JavaScript function inside the currently selected page. Returns the response as JSON,
so returned values have to be JSON-serializable.

cachedTools.name: fill
cachedTools.description: Type text into a input, text area or select an option from a <select> element.

cachedTools.name: fill_form
cachedTools.description: Fill out multiple form elements at once

cachedTools.name: get_console_message
cachedTools.description: Gets a console message by its ID. You can get all messages by calling list_console_messages.

cachedTools.name: get_network_request
cachedTools.description: Gets a network request by an optional reqid, if omitted returns the currently selected request in the DevTools Network panel.

cachedTools.name: handle_dialog
cachedTools.description: If a browser dialog was opened, use this command to handle it

cachedTools.name: hover
cachedTools.description: Hover over the provided element

cachedTools.name: lighthouse_audit
cachedTools.description: Get Lighthouse score and reports for accessibility, SEO and best practices. This excludes performance. For performance audits, run performance_start_trace

cachedTools.name: list_console_messages
cachedTools.description: List all console messages for the currently selected page since the last navigation.

cachedTools.name: list_network_requests
cachedTools.description: List all requests for the currently selected page since the last navigation.

cachedTools.name: list_pages
cachedTools.description: Get a list of pages  open in the browser.

cachedTools.name: navigate_page
cachedTools.description: Go to a URL, or back, forward, or reload. Use project URL if not specified otherwise.

cachedTools.name: new_page
cachedTools.description: Open a new tab and load a URL. Use project URL if not specified otherwise.

cachedTools.name: performance_analyze_insight
cachedTools.description: Provides more detailed information on a specific Performance Insight of an insight set that was highlighted in the results of a trace recording.

cachedTools.name: performance_start_trace
cachedTools.description: Start a performance trace on the selected webpage. Use to find frontend performance issues, Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), and improve page load speed.

cachedTools.name: performance_stop_trace
cachedTools.description: Stop the active performance trace recording on the selected webpage.

cachedTools.name: press_key
cachedTools.description: Press a key or key combination. Use this when other input methods like fill() cannot be used (e.g., keyboard shortcuts, navigation keys, or special key combinations).

cachedTools.name: resize_page
cachedTools.description: Resizes the selected page's window so that the page has specified dimension

cachedTools.name: select_page
cachedTools.description: Select a page as a context for future tool calls.

cachedTools.name: take_memory_snapshot
cachedTools.description: Capture a memory heapsnapshot of the currently selected page to memory leak debugging

cachedTools.name: take_screenshot
cachedTools.description: Take a screenshot of the page or element.

cachedTools.name: take_snapshot
cachedTools.description:
Take a text snapshot of the currently selected page based on the a11y tree. The snapshot lists page elements along with a unique
identifier (uid). Always use the latest snapshot. Prefer taking a snapshot over taking a screenshot. The snapshot indicates the element selected
in the DevTools Elements panel (if any).

cachedTools.name: type_text
cachedTools.description: Type text using keyboard into a previously focused input

cachedTools.name: upload_file
cachedTools.description: Upload a file through a provided element.

cachedTools.name: wait_for
cachedTools.description: Wait for the specified text to appear on the selected page.

cachedTools.name: list_notebooks
cachedTools.description: List all NotebookLM notebooks.

cachedTools.name: create_notebook
cachedTools.description: Create a new NotebookLM notebook.

cachedTools.name: delete_notebook
cachedTools.description: Delete a NotebookLM notebook.

cachedTools.name: rename_notebook
cachedTools.description: Rename a NotebookLM notebook.

cachedTools.name: describe_notebook
cachedTools.description: Get an AI-generated summary and suggested topics for a notebook.

cachedTools.name: list_sources
cachedTools.description: List all sources in a notebook.

cachedTools.name: add_url_source
cachedTools.description: Add a URL (web page or YouTube video) as a source to a notebook.

cachedTools.name: add_text_source
cachedTools.description: Add pasted text as a source to a notebook.

cachedTools.name: delete_source
cachedTools.description: Delete a source from a notebook.

cachedTools.name: get_source_guide
cachedTools.description: Get an AI-generated summary and keywords for a specific source.

cachedTools.name: ask
cachedTools.description: Ask the notebook a question. Returns the answer and a conversation_id for follow-up questions.

cachedTools.name: get_chat_history
cachedTools.description: Get Q&A history for the most recent conversation in a notebook.

cachedTools.name: list_artifacts
cachedTools.description: List all AI-generated artifacts in a notebook.

cachedTools.name: generate_audio
cachedTools.description: Generate an Audio Overview (podcast) for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the saved file path.

cachedTools.name: generate_video
cachedTools.description: Generate a Video Overview for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the saved file path.

cachedTools.name: generate_report
cachedTools.description: Generate a report (Briefing Doc, Study Guide, Blog Post, or Custom). Waits for completion and returns the content.

cachedTools.name: generate_quiz
cachedTools.description: Generate a Quiz for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the quiz content.

cachedTools.name: generate_flashcards
cachedTools.description: Generate Flashcards for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the flashcard content.

cachedTools.name: generate_infographic
cachedTools.description: Generate an Infographic for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the saved file path.

cachedTools.name: generate_slide_deck
cachedTools.description: Generate a Slide Deck for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the saved file path.

cachedTools.name: generate_mind_map
cachedTools.description: Generate a Mind Map for a notebook. Waits for completion and returns the artifact info.

cachedTools.name: delete_artifact
cachedTools.description: Delete an artifact from a notebook.

cachedTools.name: list_notes
cachedTools.description: List all user-created notes in a notebook.

cachedTools.name: create_note
cachedTools.description: Create a new note in a notebook.

cachedTools.name: update_note
cachedTools.description: Update an existing note's title and content.

cachedTools.name: delete_note
cachedTools.description: Delete a note from a notebook.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_status
cachedTools.description: Palace overview — total drawers, wing and room counts

cachedTools.name: mempalace_list_wings
cachedTools.description: List all wings with drawer counts

cachedTools.name: mempalace_list_rooms
cachedTools.description: List rooms within a wing (or all rooms if no wing given)

cachedTools.name: mempalace_get_taxonomy
cachedTools.description: Full taxonomy: wing → room → drawer count

cachedTools.name: mempalace_get_aaak_spec
cachedTools.description: Get the AAAK dialect specification — the compressed memory format MemPalace uses. Call this if you need to read or write AAAK-compressed memories.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_kg_query
cachedTools.description: Query the knowledge graph for an entity's relationships. Returns typed facts with temporal validity. E.g. 'Max' → child_of Alice, loves chess, does swimming. Filter by date with as_of to see what was true at a point in time.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_kg_add
cachedTools.description: Add a fact to the knowledge graph. Subject → predicate → object with optional time window. E.g. ('Max', 'started_school', 'Year 7', valid_from='2026-09-01').

cachedTools.name: mempalace_kg_invalidate
cachedTools.description: Mark a fact as no longer true. E.g. ankle injury resolved, job ended, moved house.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_kg_timeline
cachedTools.description: Chronological timeline of facts. Shows the story of an entity (or everything) in order.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_kg_stats
cachedTools.description: Knowledge graph overview: entities, triples, current vs expired facts, relationship types.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_traverse
cachedTools.description: Walk the palace graph from a room. Shows connected ideas across wings — the tunnels. Like following a thread through the palace: start at 'chromadb-setup' in wing_code, discover it connects to wing_myproject (planning) and wing_user (feelings about it).

cachedTools.name: mempalace_find_tunnels
cachedTools.description: Find rooms that bridge two wings — the hallways connecting different domains. E.g. what topics connect wing_code to wing_team?

cachedTools.name: mempalace_graph_stats
cachedTools.description: Palace graph overview: total rooms, tunnel connections, edges between wings.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_search
cachedTools.description: Semantic search. Returns verbatim drawer content with similarity scores.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_check_duplicate
cachedTools.description: Check if content already exists in the palace before filing

cachedTools.name: mempalace_add_drawer
cachedTools.description: File verbatim content into the palace. Checks for duplicates first.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_delete_drawer
cachedTools.description: Delete a drawer by ID. Irreversible.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_diary_write
cachedTools.description: Write to your personal agent diary in AAAK format. Your observations, thoughts, what you worked on, what matters. Each agent has their own diary with full history. Write in AAAK for compression — e.g. 'SESSION:2026-04-04|built.palace.graph+diary.tools|ALC.req:agent.diaries.in.aaak|★★★'. Use entity codes from the AAAK spec.

cachedTools.name: mempalace_diary_read
cachedTools.description: Read your recent diary entries (in AAAK). See what past versions of yourself recorded — your journal across sessions.
